title: rosa rubiginosa var. dumetorum
intro: Rosa rubiginosa var. dumetorum, also known as the sweetbriar rose, is a variant of the fragrant rose species Rosa rubiginosa. This plant is rich in anthocyanins, flavonoids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Rosa rubiginosa var. dumetorum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The herbal preparation of Rosa rubiginosa var. dumetorum is typically made into tea, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
